final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original UI design system showcase illustration featuring a web Dashboard, mobile interfaces, cards, buttons, and controls.

Style/medium: needs a classic minimalist tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must include multi-layer layout presenting web Dashboard, mobile UI, cards, buttons, and controls together in one cohesive system view
Subject: must include all UI components:
  - Web Dashboard panel (data visualizations, charts, nav)
  - Mobile interface screens (at least 2 views)
  - Card components (various states)
  - Button components (various states)
  - Controls / widgets (toggles, sliders, inputs, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: needs a deep dark tech environment — exact background treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a visually striking, high-impact atmosphere with strong depth and hierarchy — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cool-toned tech direction with vivid accent highlights — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sleek, glass-morphism or layered surface treatment — exact sheen and depth is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve clear visual hierarchy across all UI layers; all components must read as part of one unified design system
Avoid: flat, low-contrast, or cluttered layouts that obscure component hierarchy
